summary.zh-CN: 变更说明: 统一了 Code Server 的主要打开入口，从会话、提案等场景进入编辑环境会更一致。
summary.en: Change Summary: Unified the main Code Server entry flow so opening the editor from sessions, proposals, and related entry points feels more consistent.

bodyHtml.zh-CN:
产品改进

统一了 Code Server 的主要打开入口

  • 变更说明: 统一了 Code Server 的主要打开入口，从会话、提案等场景进入编辑环境会更一致。
  • 影响范围: 影响 code-server 相关功能。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过原有功能入口使用即可，本版本安装后会直接带来相关行为更新。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

按工作区打开项目

  • 变更说明: 支持按工作区打开项目，多仓库场景下查看和切换代码更方便。
  • 影响范围: 影响 code-server 相关功能。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过原有功能入口使用即可，本版本安装后会直接带来相关行为更新。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

会话中的本地路径现在可以直接识别并打开

  • 变更说明: 会话中的本地路径现在可以直接识别并打开，减少手动查找文件的步骤。
  • 影响范围: 影响 code-server 相关功能、conversation 相关功能。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过原有功能入口使用即可，本版本安装后会直接带来相关行为更新。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

问题修复

Code Server 实例状态管理

  • 变更说明: 优化了 Code Server 实例状态管理，减少重启后残留进程或状态不一致的问题。
  • 影响范围: 影响 code-server 相关功能。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过原有功能入口使用即可，本版本安装后会直接带来相关行为更新。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

会话和提案中的代码打开链路

  • 变更说明: 优化了会话和提案中的代码打开链路，减少旧入口带来的跳转异常和使用混乱。
  • 影响范围: 影响 code-server 相关功能。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过原有功能入口使用即可，本版本安装后会直接带来相关行为更新。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

部分页面卡片的展示效果

  • 变更说明: 改进了部分页面卡片的展示效果，提升不同尺寸下的可读性。
  • 影响范围: 影响 reports 相关功能、前端配置、code-server 相关功能。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过原有功能入口使用即可，本版本安装后会直接带来相关行为更新。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。
bodyHtml.en:
Product Improvements

Unified the main Code Server entry flow so opening the editor from sessions

  • Change Summary: Unified the main Code Server entry flow so opening the editor from sessions, proposals, and related entry points feels more consistent.
  • Impact: Affects Code Server.
  • How to Use: Use the existing entry points for the affected feature; the updated behavior is available after installing this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

Workspace-based project launching

  • Change Summary: Added workspace-based project launching to make multi-repository code access easier.
  • Impact: Affects Code Server.
  • How to Use: Use the existing entry points for the affected feature; the updated behavior is available after installing this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

Local paths in conversations can now be recognized

  • Change Summary: Local paths in conversations can now be recognized and opened directly, reducing manual file lookup.
  • Impact: Affects Code Server, Conversation.
  • How to Use: Use the existing entry points for the affected feature; the updated behavior is available after installing this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

Fixes

Code Server instance state handling

  • Change Summary: Improved Code Server instance state handling to reduce stale processes and inconsistent state after restarts.
  • Impact: Affects Code Server.
  • How to Use: Use the existing entry points for the affected feature; the updated behavior is available after installing this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

Code-opening flows in sessions

  • Change Summary: Improved code-opening flows in sessions and proposals, reducing launch issues and confusion caused by legacy entry points.
  • Impact: Affects Code Server.
  • How to Use: Use the existing entry points for the affected feature; the updated behavior is available after installing this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

Parts of the UI

  • Change Summary: Refined parts of the UI to improve card readability across different screen sizes.
  • Impact: Affects Reports.
  • How to Use: Use the existing entry points for the affected feature; the updated behavior is available after installing this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.
